column1: # Title: average electricity water coeffcient by China provinces

# Source: original GCAM water-electricity workbooks. Many values from Macknick et al and IEAGHG. Estimated with ChatGPT investigation (based on related HK report. Core assumption including 1 HK thermal power plants use direct/once-through seawater cooling where cooling is needed. 2 Freshwater withdrawal and freshwater consumption for cooling are set to 0. 3 OCGT peak units are air-cooled and set to 0. 4 PV/wind follow original GCAM-China non-thermal coefficients.)
# Description: Calculate the average value by combining the proportion of cooling types in Hong Kong
